title: Create a card purchase
description: Create the purchase object before initiating card payment.
source: Payment Methods > 💳 Card Payments > APIs > Purchase

sourceExampleGap.reason: The merchant-facing Postman request has no saved error response; no response was inferred during migration.

title: Initiate payment from the customer browser
description: Open this endpoint from the customer browser after creating the purchase.
source: Payment Methods > 💳 Card Payments > APIs > Payment (To be initiated From client browser)

sourceExampleGap.reason: The merchant-facing Postman request has no saved success response; no response was inferred during migration.

errorResponse.message: Only purchases that can be paid for can be initiated for payment.

title: Get card purchase status
description: Retrieve the latest card purchase state.
source: Payment Methods > 💳 Card Payments > APIs > Get Status

title: Refund a card purchase
description: Initiate a refund for the purchase.
source: Payment Methods > 💳 Card Payments > APIs > Refund

errorResponse.message: Only Purchases with `status == (paid)` can be refunded.

title: Cancel a card purchase
description: Cancel a purchase that has not reached a terminal state.
source: Payment Methods > 💳 Card Payments > APIs > Cancel

errorResponse.message: Only purchases that can be paid for can be canceled.

title: Google Pay seamless — decrypted flow
description: Create a purchase using the decrypted Google Pay payload contract.
source: Payment Methods > 💰 APMs (Alternative Payment Methods) > 🌎 Google Pay (Seamless) > APIs > Purchases (Decrypted Flow)

title: Google Pay redirect — create session
description: Create a hosted Google Pay session for an existing customer.
source: Payment Methods > 💰 APMs (Alternative Payment Methods) > 🌎 Google Pay Redirect > APIs > Session

errorResponse.message: Customer does not exist with this Customer Id

title: Google Pay seamless — get status
description: Retrieve the latest seamless Google Pay purchase state.
source: Payment Methods > 💰 APMs (Alternative Payment Methods) > 🌎 Google Pay (Seamless) > APIs > Get Status

title: Apple Pay seamless — decrypted flow
description: Create a purchase using the decrypted Apple Pay payload contract.
source: Payment Methods > 💰 APMs (Alternative Payment Methods) > 🌎 Apple Pay (Seamless) > APIs > Purchases (Decrypted Flow)

title: Apple Pay redirect — create session
description: Create a hosted Apple Pay session for an existing customer.
source: Payment Methods > 💰 APMs (Alternative Payment Methods) > 🌎 Apple Pay Redirect > APIs > Session

errorResponse.message: Customer does not exist with this Customer Id

title: Apple Pay redirect — get status
description: Retrieve the latest redirect Apple Pay purchase state.
source: Payment Methods > 💰 APMs (Alternative Payment Methods) > 🌎 Apple Pay Redirect > APIs > Get Status

sourceExampleGap.reason: The merchant-facing Postman request has no saved success response; no response was inferred during migration.

title: Get Apple Pay purchase status
description: Retrieve the latest Apple Pay purchase state.
source: Payment Methods > 💰 APMs (Alternative Payment Methods) > 🌎 Apple Pay (Seamless) > APIs > Get Status

title: List payouts pending manual review
description: Retrieve payouts using the filters in the live collection.
